title: Localize /instance/settings/access page (ZAI-153 follow-up — 8-locale sweep)
description:
## Context

The board flagged untranslated content on **/instance/settings/access** in Russian locale (ZAI-153). The page still leaks English strings in the breadcrumb, headings, action labels, and uses non-localized date formatting.

Source URL the board reviewed: http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/access (locale=ru).

## Concrete leaks called out by the board

Breadcrumb / heading area:
- "Board" (breadcrumb root)
- "Instance Settings" (above breadcrumb)
- "Access" (current crumb / heading prefix)

Page body:
- "Search users"
- "Save company access"
- "Current memberships"
- "Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership."
- "Remove instance admin"
- "owner • active" (membership row meta)
- "active company memberships" (count summary text)

Dates: rows render `5/5/2026` / `5/4/2026` (US `M/D/YYYY`). Must use the **regional standard for the selected language** — i.e. a locale-aware `Intl.DateTimeFormat` / formatter rather than a hardcoded en-US format. The board's note: `//включая даты в региональный стандарт выбранного языка`.

## Scope

1. **Find the page** — likely `ui/src/pages/InstanceSettings/AccessPage.tsx` or similar under `ui/src/pages/instance/settings/access/`. Trace the route from `/instance/settings/access` to the component(s).
2. **Wrap every leaking string in `t()`** with sensibly-namespaced keys (mirror the conventions used by the round-3 sweep — `instance_settings.access.*`, etc.).
3. **Localize dates** — replace the `M/D/YYYY` formatter with a locale-aware one (use the same helper the rest of the round-3 sweep adopted; see `5309a195 fix(i18n): complete round-3 localization` for the formatter pattern). Verify the date renders correctly in `ru`, `de`, `fr`, `es`, `pt`, `el`, `uk`, `zh`.
4. **Sweep all 8 locales** — `en`, `ru`, `de`, `fr`, `es`, `pt`, `el`, `uk`, `zh`. Add the new keys to every `*.json` translation file with native translations (do NOT leave English placeholders in non-en files — that was the round-3 rejection criterion per memory note `project_localization_round3.md`).
5. **Run a DOM sweep** on the `/instance/settings/access` route in each locale and confirm zero English-leakage. Save a sweep report (or attach one to this issue) showing FAIL→PASS transition.

## Acceptance criteria

- All listed strings are wrapped in `t()` and resolve to native translations in all 8 locales.
- Date columns render in locale-appropriate format (e.g. `ru` → `05.05.2026`, `de` → `05.05.2026`, `en` → `5/5/2026`, etc.) — uses `Intl.DateTimeFormat` keyed off the active i18n language.
- DOM sweep report attached: zero English leakage on `/instance/settings/access` per locale.
- Branch: `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` (the localization branch we're already on).

## Reference

- Round-3 commit pattern: `git show 5309a195` for the locale-aware formatter approach.
- Memory note `project_localization_round3.md`: board rejected previous merges when 8-locale sweep wasn't clean — do not request CEO approval on this child until the sweep is clean across all 8 locales.
- Memory note `feedback_qa_warn_is_fail.md`: a sweep with `WARN` and any leakage = FAIL.

project.name: Localization
project.description:
**Project Goal**

Replace hardcoded English text in UI with localization variables (react-i18next / i18next), while simultaneously ensuring support for two languages: English (en) and Russian (ru). A language switcher dropdown menu is added to the UI, designed according to the project design. The process is executed iteratively by a team of agents until all text elements are fully covered.

**Directory Structure**

```
C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales\
├── en\                         # Translation files — English
├── ru\                         # Translation files — Russian
└── ~temp\
    ├── PROJECT_DESIGN.md
    └── HARDCODED_ENGLISH_ELEMENTS_MAP.md

```

**Localization Library**

react-i18next / i18next — configuration and existing translations are located in: `C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales`

**Agent Roles**

**Developer** — localization developer: replaces hardcode with `t('key')`, maintains `en\` and `ru\` files, implements dropdown menu.

**QA** — browser tester: checks server availability at [`http://127.0.0.1:3105/`](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), searches for unreplaced English strings when Russian language is active, updates MAP file.

**Orchestrator** — monitors the last update date of MAP file; if file is updated — starts new Developer → QA cycle.

**Statuses in MAP File**

| Status         | Set By        | Meaning                                          |
| -------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| TODO           | Browser agent | Found English text, needs localization           |
| DONE           | Developer     | Localization completed, awaiting QA verification |
| TODO + comment | QA            | Checked, found problem, returned to Developer    |
| QA\_OK         | QA            | Checked, everything works correctly              |

**Working Cycle (Loop)**

```
Browser agent → TODO
      ↓
Developer → DONE
      ↓
QA checks DONE
      ↓
  [not OK] → TODO + comment → Developer → DONE → QA...
  [OK]    → QA_OK

```

**Plan**

**Step 1 — Browser agent: audit of visible English elements**

* Opens [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), switches to Russian language.
* Goes through all available screens.
* For each found English text, records in MAP file:
  * full element text
  * HTML element
  * CSS selector
  * status TODO

**Step 2 — Developer: hardcode replacement**

* Takes records with TODO status from MAP file.
* By text, HTML element and CSS selector finds location in codebase.
* Replaces with t('key'), adds translations to en\ and ru.
* Sets status DONE.

**Step 3 — QA: DONE verification**

* Receives signal about appearance of records with DONE status in MAP file.
* First basic check: [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) responds and not black screen. If black screen — cycle stops, Developer fixes.
* Switches to Russian language, checks specific elements from DONE records.
* If problem — changes status back to TODO with comment on what exactly is wrong.
* If everything is correct — sets QA\_OK.

**Step 4 — Iteration**

* Browser agent again goes through all screens searching for remaining English strings.
* New strings → TODO, cycle repeats.
* Orchestrator starts new cycle with each appearance of TODO in MAP file.

**Final Verification (when all records are QA\_OK)**

* QA goes through all records with QA\_OK status — full regression run.
* Checks that previously completed localization hasn't broken during subsequent changes.
* If something broke — record returns to TODO with comment, cycle resumes.
* If everything is fine — project is considered completed.

**Completion Criterion**

All records in MAP file have QA\_OK status, final regression run is passed, server [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) loads stably.

issue.title: Localization round 3: hunt remaining hardcoded English strings (board-flagged)
RU localization: Plugin Manager + remaining Settings leakage (parent ZAI-155)
Localize 4 board-flagged pages: company access, user board, instance general, instance adapters (parent ZAI-175)
